item.title: maRSS Tray Reader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: maRSS Tray Reader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: dalman
item.itunes:summary:
maRSS Tray Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
maRSS Tray Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
maRSS Tray Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3

tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)

SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: nikknizz
item.itunes:summary:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with simple right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.2: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.description:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with simple right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.2: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with simple right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.2: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]

item.title: Simple File Locker [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple File Locker [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Simple File Locker
(Utilities)
This small application can lock and unlock files with password, prevents others from opening them without permission.
Update 13/05/2025:
-Updated version 1.1, fixed security risk.

Read before using:
-Don't lock files that have special characters in name! English for the win.

Features:
-Lock & unlock files
-Open locked file then automatically lock after closing.
-File context menu.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me or PM via Telegram at t.me/lkonle
[read more]
item.description:
Simple File Locker
(Utilities)
This small application can lock and unlock files with password, prevents others from opening them without permission.
Update 13/05/2025:
-Updated version 1.1, fixed security risk.

Read before using:
-Don't lock files that have special characters in name! English for the win.

Features:
-Lock & unlock files
-Open locked file then automatically lock after closing.
-File context menu.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me or PM via Telegram at t.me/lkonle
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Simple File Locker
(Utilities)
This small application can lock and unlock files with password, prevents others from opening them without permission.
Update 13/05/2025:
-Updated version 1.1, fixed security risk.

Read before using:
-Don't lock files that have special characters in name! English for the win.

Features:
-Lock & unlock files
-Open locked file then automatically lock after closing.
-File context menu.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me or PM via Telegram at t.me/lkonle
[read more]

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: Red Ball 1 [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Red Ball 1 [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]
item.description:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]

item.title: Minecraft Tower Defense [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Minecraft Tower Defense [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Minecraft Tower Defense
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Play Minecraft Tower Defense game now!
Minecraft Tower Defense is a strategy and defense game inspired by Minecraft. In the game, your mission is to defend your base and fight the creatures that are coming to your tower.
You need to create a winding path to distract monsters to your tower, with a lot of traps placed on that path such as egg throwing tower, lake, archery tower, bomb... After each wave of monsters attack object, you have more resources to upgrade and build more defense weapons to stop the enemies.
Minecraft Tower Defense is really attractive and addictive!

Features:

Choose from a variety of defensive towers and weapons
Build a complex path to misdirect your enemies
Try to survive as many waves as possible!
[read more]

Play Minecraft Tower Defense game now!

You need to create a winding path to distract monsters to your tower, with a lot of traps placed on that path such as egg throwing tower, lake, archery tower, bomb... After each wave of monsters attack object, you have more resources to upgrade and build more defense weapons to stop the enemies.
Minecraft Tower Defense is really attractive and addictive!

Try to survive as many waves as possible!
